title: Bee Info
description: Bee Info is a Fabric client-side mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that shows hive/nest occupancy and honey at a glance.
body: Bee Info is a client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that lets you quickly check Bee Nests and Beehives. Right-click a nest/hive in-world or hover one in your inventory to see a clean popup with bee count (x/3), honey percentage, and a honey progress bar. It reads available NBT/component data, includes a configurable UI scale, and supports Best Guess or Strict bee count modes for multiplayer compatibility. No server-side plugin required.
